work.description: Building intelligent computer science tutoring systems using modern web technologies, including JavaScript/ES6, React, Flow, and Sass. Independently conducting research on CS student experiences, involving literature review, study design and preparation, and research paper drafting and writing. Assisting with research projects and publications through data analysis and research paper review.

Developing curriculum and assignments for recently admitted UW Computer Science and Engineering transfer students. Lecturing course material to students, and facilitating assistance for academic and cultural struggles faced by transfer students within CSE.

projects.name: koconut
projects.description: an intelligent CS1 (introductory computer science) tutor which models and tests student knowledge through dynamic concept selection and problem assessment

projects.name: DubMaps
projects.description: a UW campus map tool that can visualize student populations across campus using heatmaps and charts, and provide building information for a student’s personal class schedule
